creator: desmo@bandwidth.org
text:
Probe of keyboard fails at boot time.  Keyboard probe hangs and keyboard does not work. 
If I tap on the Num-Lock key during boot, it gets probed fine and works.
I am using an NMB keyboard.
Model:  RT8255CW+
P/N:  121296-001 REV. B
S/N:  B0450946

Fix: 

Tap on the Num-lock key during boot, or type /kernel at the boot prompt.
It will then boot fine.
How-To-Repeat: Boot.
